subject: physics
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.25
question_html:
A pure sample of iodine-131 decays into xenon with a half-life of 8 days.

What is number of iodine atoms remainingnumber of xenon atoms formed after 24 days?

A.  18

B.  17

C.  78

D.  87
examiners_html: The majority of candidates correctly selected option B. This question had the highest discrimination index on the HL paper.
